mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, code, path, level, sort
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO catalog_node (parent_id, name, code, path, level, sort) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{path}, #{level}, #{sort})

INSERT INTO catalog_node (parent_id, name, code, path, level, sort) VALUES
(#{item.parentId}, #{item.name}, #{item.code}, #{item.path}, #{item.level}, #{item.sort})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM catalog_node WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM catalog_node ORDER BY path
SELECT FROM catalog_node WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort
SELECT FROM catalog_node WHERE path LIKE CONCAT(#{path}, '/%') OR path = #{path} ORDER BY path
SELECT MAX(sort) FROM catalog_node WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM catalog_node WHERE parent_id = #{nodeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE catalog_node SET path = #{path} WHERE id = #{id}

update.foreach: UPDATE catalog_node SET path = #{item.path} WHERE id = #{item.id}

mapper.update: UPDATE catalog_node SET name = COALESCE(#{name}, name), code = COALESCE(#{code}, code) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE catalog_node SET sort = #{sort} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE catalog_node SET path = CONCAT(#{newPath}, SUBSTRING(path, LENGTH(#{oldPath}) + 1)), level = level + #{levelDelta} WHERE path LIKE CONCAT(#{oldPath}, '/%')
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM catalog_node WHERE id IN
#{id}
